_meta.description: InterferonAtlas IFN signature modules — curated gene lists for IFN Spectrum Score computation
_meta.author: Siya, IISER Tirupati
_meta.scoring_method: decoupler AUCell or WSUM per cell/sample
_meta.notes: Gene symbols are HGNC. Cross-check against your dataset's gene vocabulary before scoring.

M1_acute_IFN_antiviral.label: Acute IFN-I antiviral
M1_acute_IFN_antiviral.biology: Early innate antiviral response; type I IFN (IFN-α/β) stimulated genes
M1_acute_IFN_antiviral.reference: Schneider et al. 2014 Annu Rev Immunol; Interferome DB (type I ISGs)
M1_acute_IFN_antiviral.TODO: Verify these 20 genes are in your scRNA-seq feature space. Add/remove based on Interferome DB query.

M2_chronic_IFN_TME.label: Chronic IFN-γ TME
M2_chronic_IFN_TME.biology: Tumor-driven chronic IFN-γ signaling; immune suppression in TME
M2_chronic_IFN_TME.reference: Benci et al. 2019 Cell; TCGA pan-cancer IFN-γ signature
M2_chronic_IFN_TME.TODO: Review Benci 2019 Table S1 for additional genes. HLA genes are highly variable in scRNA-seq — assess dropout rates.

M3_exhaustion_IFN_overlap.label: Exhaustion-IFN overlap
M3_exhaustion_IFN_overlap.biology: T cell dysfunction signature co-occurring with chronic IFN signaling
M3_exhaustion_IFN_overlap.reference: Wherry & Kurachi 2015 Nat Rev Immunol; Sade-Feldman 2018 Cell GSE120575
M3_exhaustion_IFN_overlap.TODO: These come from your own CD4+ T cell dataset — validate with your Scanpy marker gene analysis first.

M4_IFN_suppression_evasion.label: IFN suppression / evasion
M4_IFN_suppression_evasion.biology: Negative regulators of IFN signaling; tumor immune escape machinery
M4_IFN_suppression_evasion.TODO: Cross-check TCGA evasion literature (Zaretsky 2016 NEJM; Patel 2017 Nature). Some TRIM genes may be noisy.

scoring_config.notes: Weights are initial estimates. Recalibrate using TCGA anchor samples (pure acute vs pure chronic) in notebook 01.
